description: CompositionBlack and brown animal print one shoulder top, made of blended fabric, has an asymmetric neckline, one cap sleeve with ruffles on the left, elasticated under the arm on the right and has a concealed zipper on the left under the armhole extending to the hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleachDo not wringUse warm ironCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish top from femella. The blended fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sandals for that perfect girly look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
